downloadCurrent.label: Download Current Video
downloadCurrent.hint: Use this when a page blocks the native video context menu.
downloadCurrent.success: Queued the current video in FlowSelect.
downloadCurrent.noVideo: No active video was found on this page.
downloadCurrent.offline: Open the desktop app before sending downloads.
downloadCurrent.failed: Couldn't queue the current video from this tab.

highest.hint: Some high-quality videos may enter the transcode queue after download.

best.label: Highest
best.description: Prefer the highest available tier. Some downloads may enter the transcode queue after download.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Prefer broadly compatible high-quality downloads before wider fallback.

data_saver.label: Saver
data_saver.description: Prefer lighter downloads and lower bandwidth usage when possible.

alerts.backgroundUnavailable: FlowSelect extension background is unavailable. Please reload the extension.
alerts.desktopUnavailable: FlowSelect desktop app is not connected. Please open FlowSelect and try again.
alerts.playbackTimeUnavailable: Unable to read current playback time.
alerts.clipPointsRequired: Please set both IN and OUT points first.
alerts.clipRangeInvalid: OUT must be later than IN.
alerts.videoElementUnavailable: Unable to locate a video element.
alerts.copyUnsupported: Current browser does not support image copy.
alerts.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please check clipboard permission.
